description: Style NoteLet only transform your everyday life from grey and monotonous to fun, colourful and creatively eventful! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these yummy tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and on-trend when you're wearing anything from this summery collection.Product DetailsBlack top with white spots, V-neck with long tie-ups at front, three quarter length puffed sleeves lightly gathered to narrow one button cuffs, smocking detail at shoulders, yoked back and body gathered to smocked hemMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coolDo not bleach or tumble dryCool ironSizeLoose FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 38
